dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires trend-following on multiple instruments with dynamic direction. Converted 10-period MA reference to sma_10 (closest match). Stop loss calculated as 1.5 × ATR approximated to 2.25% based on typical ATR scaling for daily timeframes. Position sizing (3.5% per trade, max 8 concurrent) should be managed at portfolio level. ADX > 20 confirms trend presence. Entry/exit use MA crosses for trend confirmation. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction means long entries on uptrends, short on downtrends.

source_rule_text: A trader should adopt a big-picture perspective on market direction, trade with the trend across multiple instruments while maintaining strict risk control, because this approach has structural validity regardless of market conditions.
